title: Viral Genome Release and Native Viral Particle Conversion Measured Through Temperature Ramping in Real Time PCR Machine
author: Antonio Real-Hohn

steps_raw.instruction: Purified Virus (Rhinovirus, Poliovirus, Coxsackie-virus, etc.) undetermined Undetermined
Fluorescent Probe for DNA/RNA (SYTO-82) and/or Fluorescent Probe for Protein (SYPRO Orange) 0.000005 Undetermined
Viral Thermo Stable Buffer (Phosphate, Cacodylate, etc.) Potassium Phosphate Buffer 0.1 Undetermined
Temperature Ramping (CFX Connect Real-Time PCR Detection System BioRad, MFPL) Undetermined, Start Undetermined, End
